results.title: Astro dashboard CSS path fix
results.content: The Astro admin console was missing base=/dashboard in src/dashboard/astro.config.mjs, so built CSS and JS assets resolved to root /_astro paths and failed when served by the Python app under /dashboard. Setting base to /dashboard fixes asset URLs; the dashboard bundle or Docker image must be rebuilt after the change because existing dist output still contains old asset paths.

results.title: Disable Input focus ring
results.content: Removed DaisyUI/Tailwind focus ring utilities from shared Input component by adding explicit no-focus-ring classes to normal and affix render paths in src/components/atoms/Input/Input.tsx.

results.title: AntD-only UI pass with fullscreen loaders
results.content: Refactored rental-management-ui toward AntD-only styling by removing all custom className usage under src/app, src/components, and src/features. Added shared FullScreenLoader and InfoList primitives, replaced initial page/detail loading cards with full-screen Spin-based loaders, rewrote shared surfaces/layout/auth/public/dashboard screens to use Ant Design components and inline styles instead of globals-based custom classes, and reduced globals.css to base tokens and resets only while preserving primary color #166534. Verified with rg finding no className usage, yarn lint, and yarn build.

results.title: Admin route split and architecture docs refresh
results.content: Split admin HTTP presentation into context/api/dashboard modules, removed legacy Python-rendered dashboard handlers, shifted tests to Astro plus JSON admin APIs, and expanded README/operator guides with whole-system architecture diagrams and route responsibilities. routes.py remains only as a composition boundary in the presentation layer.

results.title: Phase 4.3 completed with console serving seam
results.content: Completed Phase 4.3 without creating a commit. Added dashboard config for base_path/static_dir/legacy_compat_enabled, served built dashboard assets under /console, redirected legacy setup/login/dashboard GET routes to /console equivalents when compatibility is disabled, and added tests/integration/test_phase4_3_console_gate.py. Focused verification now passes for architecture extraction, admin use cases, Astro scaffold, HTTP admin routes, setup/login flows, and console static serving. Broader Phase 4 remains open for observability and production hardening.
